scripts.test:wake-lock: rm -rf .tmp/wake-lock-test && tsc --target ES2020 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --strict --types node --lib ES2020,DOM --skipLibCheck --outDir .tmp/wake-lock-test src/wake-lock.ts src/wake-lock.test.ts && node --test .tmp/wake-lock-test/wake-lock.test.js && rm -rf .tmp/wake-lock-test
